body_preview:
https://plgenesis.com?utm_source=devspot&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=hackathon&utm_content=devspot_newsletter

 
Hi, benjamin barber
 


Attention Builders

 


1 Hour Left to Submit Your Project


Hackathon Deadline is Getting Closer

 

https://devspot.app/TO/hackathons/52/analytics/hackathons?activeTab=overview

 
The submission window for PL_Genesis: Frontiers of Collaboration is about to close.
 
Over 2,000 builders have entered the frontier—pushing the boundaries of AI, coordination, and autonomous systems. Now it’s your
moment to ship.
 
 


Builders — Quick Reality Check:

https://drive.google.com/file/d/1NxbyUehxnRGkd_3J-WZlaFyhhqjqXGtI/view?usp=sharing

No sponsor track integration = no valid submission. Even if your project is 🔥.
 
If you want judges to actually see your build (and compete for $150K+ in prizes), you need at least one sponsor track integration
wired in.
We broke it down step-by-step so you don’t fumble it at the finish line.

Watch The Guide [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1NxbyUehxnRGkd_3J-WZlaFyhhqjqXGtI/view?usp=sharing]

 
 


This is the final stretch

If you’ve started a project, finish it.
If you’ve been exploring ideas, commit and submit.
If you’re close, you’re closer than you think.
 


Be part of what’s next

PL_Genesis isn’t just a hackathon—it’s the start of a new coordination layer for the internet.
 
The projects submitted in the next 1 hours will define what that future looks like.
 
 
 
See you at the frontier,

https://devspot.app/

The DevSpot Team
 



https://plgenesis.com?utm_source=devspot&utm_medium=newsletter&utm_campaign=hackathon&utm_content=devspot_newsletter

 
Discord [https://discord.gg/4RY32J5fnr] • X [https://x.com/PL__Genesis] • plgenesis.com
